title: 16 Personalities Around Their Crush

title: 16 Personalities Around Their Crush
text: ife with no significant other filling that void it's an open position did I mention I'm single ah yes I find that movie to be quite Illuminating as well exploring the themes of existential dread and societal pressure to conform I especially like the part at the end where Napoleon Dynamite gets on stage and dances quite a moving character Arc I can't believe I'm finally talking to her face to face I've admired her from afar for so long and now oh crap she's been talking this whole time what hey Jenny you've met my less attractive friend Timmy right oh hi Timmy it's so good to see you again watch it Timmy so what kind of plans do you have this weekend going on a date with Jason oh that's great but I'm kind of nervous about it you shouldn't be why don't we talk through it and you'll feel better thanks so much you're such a good friend I guess the thing is it's been so long since I've been you this before [Music]
